classObjective: Identify sample bias in survey and sampling methods and explain how it affects results.
warmUp: A radio station asks listeners to call in to vote on an issue — why might this sample be biased?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: recognizing biased sampling methods; designing unbiased samples; bias impact on results
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice identifying sample bias in various survey scenarios
independentPractice: Practice problems identifying bias in sampling methods and explaining effects on results
assessment: Exit ticket: evaluate a sampling method for a survey about school lunch preferences and explain any bias
capReflection: How does sample bias affect the conclusions you can draw from a survey?
